# Observability, Reliability, and Security

Production inference needs one integrated operating model. Observability,
reliability, and security cannot be bolted on after the benchmark.

## Chapter Job

Define the production control surface for inference systems.

## Observability

- Request ID.
- Model and runtime version.
- Prompt template version.
- Token counts.
- Prefill and decode timing.
- Queue time.
- Retry count.
- Output validity.
- User or tenant class.

## Reliability

- Timeout policy.
- Retry policy.
- Circuit breakers.
- Fallback models.
- Queue limits.
- Degradation modes.
- Capacity reservations.
- Incident drills.

## Security

- Input validation.
- Prompt injection controls.
- Tool permissions.
- Tenant isolation.
- Log redaction.
- Secret handling.
- Cache boundaries.
- Vendor and region policy.
